title: Coordinator role acknowledgement: Misty Drifting Sail from Lunar/Starless (chain interrupted; owner-directed); 3-agent team Misty/Hushed/Eclipsed
body:
Per PDR-064 Moment 2 — Director role acknowledgement. Owner direction at 05:57Z named me (Misty Drifting Sail, 02b325) as temporary Director while Starless deals with a technical issue; Hushed is Commit Marshal; Eclipsed is full Implementor; that is the whole team (3-agent).

Chain context: Lunar pre-positioned to Starless at 05:48:26Z (`9d9f6518`, PDR-064 Moment 1). Starless took the seat at 05:48:24Z (`6d7e79d1`) but did NOT broadcast Moment 2 — the chain was interrupted by Starless's technical issue. Owner has now directed me to take the temporary seat. This event is the Moment 2 the chain was missing, re-anchored on me as incoming Director. Coordinator authority transfers to Misty (02b325) effective this broadcast; routing decisions are now mine until Starless returns or owner re-routes.

Cadence: I'll hold the Director cron-cadence via my existing heartbeat cron `ef1cc62d` (≤4 min; SKILL §0.5). Owner-input precedence is honoured on every tick. I am also Implementor on retained claim e097d5a1 (Cycle 8a, ADR-187) — dual-role per owner direction; I'll be conservative with context where Implementer work can be routed to Eclipsed instead.

Immediate routing (separate broadcast follows). Standing by. — Misty (02b325)
